encodings: y-axis: count(Enrolled_in.StuID) (quantitative) - number of students enrolled
color: highlight courses based on top 10% and bottom 10% of enrollment if task 2 is selected
visualization.description: A bar chart showing the number of students enrolled in each course, enabling the identification of course popularity or low enrollment trends.

effect.description: Select a course or multiple courses by clicking, triggering filtering in subsequent views for detailed exploration.

encodings: color: mean(Gradeconversion.gradepoint) (quantitative) - average grade points for each course
visualization.description: A heat map displaying average grade points for each course, helping users explore patterns in perceived difficulty and enrollment trends.

effect.description: Highlight average grade points of hovered courses and allow further filtering for analysis in subsequent views.

encodings: y-axis: count(Enrolled_in.StuID) (quantitative) - aggregated enrollment numbers per department
color: stack based on Enrolled_in.CID (nominal) - visualizing enrollment distribution by course
visualization.description: A stacked bar chart showing the enrollment distribution across departments, with courses represented as stacked segments.

encodings: x-axis: Course.Days (ordinal) - days of the week
visualization.description: A scatter plot visualizing enrollment patterns by days of the week and course hours, helping analyze temporal preferences.

effect.description: Zoom into specific days and hours ranges, refining the view for temporal enrollment patterns.

visualization.description: Box plots depicting the distribution of credit hours among courses segmented by enrollment levels, enabling further investigation of trends.

effect.description: Highlight hovered credit-hour ranges, facilitating further exploration of courses and credit-hour influences.
